question: The concept of 'serverless computing'
options: Distributing network traffic across multiple servers to prevent overload
Understanding system state through logs, metrics and traces
Running code without managing servers — cloud provider handles infrastructure
Enable asynchronous communication between services
answer: Running code without managing servers — cloud provider handles infrastructure

question: 'Infrastructure as Code' (IaC)
options: All nodes will eventually have the same data, but not necessarily at the same time
Enable asynchronous communication between services
Infrastructure layer handling service-to-service communication
Managing and provisioning infrastructure through machine-readable configuration files
answer: Managing and provisioning infrastructure through machine-readable configuration files

question: The concept of 'containerisation' (Docker)
options: Horizontal adds more machines; vertical increases capacity of existing machines
Managing and provisioning infrastructure through machine-readable configuration files
Infrastructure layer handling service-to-service communication
Packaging applications with their dependencies into portable containers
answer: Packaging applications with their dependencies into portable containers

Infrastructure layer handling service-to-service communication
Automates deployment, scaling and management of containerised applications
Understanding system state through logs, metrics and traces
answer: Automates deployment, scaling and management of containerised applications
